metadata.description: SUEWS plugins for AI agent ecosystems - runtime workflow rules for users and developer tooling for contributors

plugins.name: suews
plugins.description: Run, validate, and analyse SUEWS urban climate simulations from your AI assistant. Bundles workflow rules, the `suews-mcp` Model Context Protocol server (validation, inspection, summarise/compare/diagnose, init/convert, versioned knowledge pack), fresh-site simulation guidance with assumption ledgers/readiness levels, forcing-data checks, output interpretation, and common-error diagnostics.
